RUN 18 — DEFEAT at Floor 33 (The Champ Boss)

FINAL STATS:
- Character: Ironclad A0
- Floor Reached: 33 (Act 2 Boss)
- Cause of Death: The Champ's Execute (54 damage) at 1 HP
- Champ HP at death: 93/420 (78% damage dealt)

WHAT WENT WELL:
✓ Fiend Fire+ combo with FNP gave massive burst damage + block
✓ Survived 3 turns at 1 HP through precise block calculations
✓ Blessing of the Forge upgrading ALL cards was clutch (survived 1 extra turn)
✓ Mutagenic Strength + Mummified Hand gave free Fiend Fire for 147 damage
✓ Heavy Blade+ with 5x Str multiplier was excellent pickup
✓ Paper Phrog amplified all Vuln damage by 75%

WHAT WENT WRONG:
✗ Used Fiend Fire Turn 4 exhausting Phase 2 cards (Disarm, Shockwave, Exhume)
✗ Lost all debuff tools before Anger transition
✗ Without Disarm/Shockwave post-Anger, couldn't reduce Champ's 8 Str attacks
✗ Phase 2 was a war of attrition I couldn't win at low HP
✗ HP management throughout Act 2 was poor (entered Champ at only 45/77)
✗ Metallicize 5→10 made Champ increasingly hard to damage

KEY LESSON:
Never Fiend Fire away Phase 2 cards, even at 0 energy cost. The 147 damage was flashy but losing Disarm/Shockwave/Exhume for Phase 2 was the death sentence. Should have held those cards and done less damage in Phase 1.

KNOWLEDGE GAPS:
- Blessing of the Forge from a potion upgrades ALL cards in hand (not just one)
- The Champ's Anger timing: happens after the turn he drops below 50%, not immediately
- Metallicize from Defensive Stance stacks additively (5→10)

Best floor: 33 (new record, previous best was 28)

events.label: Post-Mortem
events.reasoning:
RUN OVER. Defeat at Act 2, Floor 23 (Book of Stabbing elite).

WHAT WENT WELL:
- Efficient Act 1 clearance, beat Guardian boss at 5 HP with smart play
- Velvet Choker (+1E) paired well with compact 13-card deck
- Inflame + Limit Break provided strong Str scaling (Str 4)
- Spheric Guardian fight was excellent (only 8 HP lost vs expected 30-50)
- Smart deck thinning: removed 2 Strikes (Empty Cage) + 1 more at shop
- Headbutt was an MVP for deck manipulation throughout

WHAT WENT WRONG:
- Never found a healing card (Reaper, Feed). This was the #1 gap the entire run.
- Entered Act 2 elite at 33 HP (44%) - below the 60% threshold for Act 2 elites
- Route locked me into Unknown->Elite->Rest with no escape path
- Book of Stabbing escalating multi-hit + Painful Stabs Wounds clogged hand
- CRITICAL MISTAKE: Elixir potion selection exhausted Shockwave instead of third Wound. This was the difference between survival and death.
- Without Shockwave's Weak 3, incoming damage was 30 instead of 20, making the turn unsurvivable

KNOWLEDGE GAPS:
- Elixir card selection UI: indices were confusing, need to understand how multi-select works for Elixir
- Buffer interaction with multi-hit: expected Buffer to absorb only first hit, but HP loss was higher than calculated
- Plated Armor: confirmed it reduces by 1 per instance of unblocked damage, not by damage amount
- Frail from Mystic attack applied through block (debuff applies regardless of damage being blocked)
